MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court took the Petition for Letters of Administration off calendar.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-13-2015 Continued To Mar-23-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Jolliffe for Alfredo Ramirez Herrera (Petitioner).

The Court addressed the bond issue. Counsel stated that he has five bond waivers and the other two are in the mail. The Court took the petition for letters of administration without bond under submission subject to receipt of the two bond waivers. The Clerk reminded counsel to notify the Court if the bond waivers are not available.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy S. Park. (Not Reported)
